summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SY Homes MFA enrolment UI (Prompt 1.2 addendum). All MFA features working correctly: enrollment flow, TOTP verification, backup codes, regeneration, disable, password change validation, sign out. 76 backend tests pass (14 MFA + 32 auth/RBAC + 31 entities - 1 expected skip). Frontend E2E tests all pass.

minor.issue: Password reuse test returns 204 instead of 400 when password not in history yet - this is expected behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: MFA enrollment flow working correctly: QR code + manual secret + TOTP verification + backup codes
GET /api/auth/me correctly returns mfa_enrollment_required=true for super_admin/director/finance roles
POST /api/auth/mfa/backup-codes/regenerate correctly requires mfa_enabled=true and returns 10 new codes
MFA challenge form appears after login when MFA is enabled
Backup code login works and decrements backup_codes_remaining
MFA disable with confirm dialog works correctly
Password change validation: client-side (mismatch, <12 chars) and server-side (wrong current, reuse)
Sign out clears session and redirects to login
Topbar MFA required pill visible for enforced roles with mfa_enabled=false
MFA enforcement banner visible on Profile/Security page
test_credentials: See /app/memory/test_credentials.md - test users use password TestUser-Dev-2026!
seed_data_creation: Test users reset via /app/backend/scripts/seed_test_users.py before each test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: MFA tests in /app/backend/tests/test_mfa.py. MFA enrollment requires pyotp for TOTP code generation. Test users are reset to mfa_enabled=false by seed_test_users.py. Backup codes are in XXXXX-XXXXX format. MFA enforced roles: super_admin, director, finance.

backend_mfa_tests: POST /api/auth/mfa/enroll/confirm with valid TOTP returns 10 backup codes ✓
frontend_mfa_tests: Profile/Security page accessible from topbar user menu ✓
MFA enforcement banner visible for super_admin/director/finance ✓
Enable MFA button opens enrollment dialog ✓
QR code displayed in enrollment dialog ✓
MFA challenge form appears on login after enrollment ✓
Backup codes remaining decrements after use ✓
New backup codes button regenerates codes ✓
MFA disable works, status returns to 'Not enrolled' ✓
Password change validation - short password error ✓
Password change validation - wrong current password error ✓
